failed_attempts:
by
  let S := (L.map length).partialSums
  have h_idx : S.findIdx (· > i) = j + 1 := by
    dsimp [j]
    have : S[0] = 0 := getElem_scanl_zero
    have : ¬ (S[0] > i) := by omega
    have : S.findIdx (· > i) ≠ 0 := mt findIdx_eq_zero.mp this
    omega
  have h_gt : S[j+1] > i := by
    rw [← h_idx]; apply getElem_findIdx
    simp [j] at hj; omega
  have h_le : S[j] ≤ i := by
    apply le_of_not_gt; intro h
    have := findIdx_le h; rw [h_idx] at this; omega
  have h_len : (L.take j).flatten.length = S[j] := by
    simp [S, List.length_flatten, map_take]
  have h_step : S[j+1] = S[j] + L[j].length := by
    simp [S, getElem_partialSums]
    rw [take_succ_getElem, sum_append]
    · simp
    · simp; exact hj
  rw [h_len, h_step] at *
  omega
